name: mojo-value-verification-tests
description: Add value-correctness assertions to Mojo shape operation tests that only verify element counts and dimensions. Use when: (1) shape tests pass but only check numel/dim not actual data, (2) adding assert_value_at/assert_all_values to split/tile/repeat/broadcast/permute tests, (3) upgrading tests from structural to behavioral verification in Mojo.
